elements.description: A typed FBI teletype document with handwritten annotations. The document includes a header with 'FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION U. S. DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE COMMUNICATIONS SECTION', a date stamp 'MAY 12 1952', and the word 'TELETYPE'. The body text describes a sighting of 'FLYING DISC' objects at the Savannah River Plant on May 10, 1952, involving four employees of DuPont Co. There are handwritten signatures, notes (including 'Note See copy of tel. from Action by Liaison'), and a 'RECORDED' stamp with the date 'MAY 20 1952' and a number.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of a red 'RECORDED' stamp with the date 'MAY 20 1952' and a number, but Description B adds extra details about typed content, handwritten annotations, and other stamps not mentioned in Description A.
